name: rasti-theme

scripts.wp:purge: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$confirm = Read-Host 'Видалити контейнери, томи та локальні image цього проєкту? Введи так'; if ($confirm -ne 'так') { Write-Host 'Скасовано.'; exit 1 }; docker compose down -v --remove-orphans --rmi local"
scripts.db:export: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force database | Out-Null; docker compose exec -T db sh -lc 'mysqldump --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -u root -proot wordpress > /tmp/wordpress.sql'; docker compose cp db:/tmp/wordpress.sql database/wordpress.sql; docker compose exec -T db rm -f /tmp/wordpress.sql"
scripts.db:import: powershell -NoProfile -Command "docker compose cp database/wordpress.sql db:/tmp/wordpress.sql; docker compose exec -T db sh -lc 'mysql --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -u root -proot wordpress < /tmp/wordpress.sql'; docker compose exec -T db rm -f /tmp/wordpress.sql"

description: Root build tooling for a reusable WordPress starter theme running in Docker.
